title: RNC speeches: RNC co-chair Lara Trump
shortDescription: RNC co-char Lara Trump was the closing speaker at the Republican National Convention Tuesday night. Watch the full speech here.

title: Lara Trump’s full 2024 RNC speech
shortDescription: Watch the full speech from Eric Trump’s wife, Lara, at the 2024 Republican National Convention in Milwaukee.

title: RNC speeches: US Senate Candidate Tim Sheehy
shortDescription: US Senate Candidate Tim Sheehy was a featured speaker at the Republican National Convention Tuesday night. Watch the full speech here.

title: Lara Trump speaks at the RNC
shortDescription: Lara Trump, daughter-in-law of Donald Trump, gives a speech to end the second night of the Republican National Convention.

title: Police shooting of man at RNC raises questions days after Trump attack
shortDescription: Police shooting of a man near RNC in Milwaukee raises questions about use of out-of-state officers for security, days after Trump assassination attempt.

title: Arizona delegate sports makeshift bandage to support Trump at RNC
shortDescription: An Arizona delegate sported a makeshift bandage on his ear to pay homage to Donald Trump after he survived an assassination attempt Saturday.

title: Kari Lake targets 'bad ideas' from Biden in RNC speech
shortDescription: Lake's six-minute remarks followed themes she hits on the campaign trail, but went over well inside Milwaukee's Fiserv Forum.

title: What 'Hillbilly Elegy' taught us about Trump VP pick JD Vance
shortDescription: "Hillbilly Elegy" thrust Ohio Sen. JD Vance into the national spotlight. Now he's Trump's vice-presidential running mate.

title: Former rival Nikki Haley endorses Trump at RNC
shortDescription: Nikki Haley, the former South Carolina governor who tried to defeat Donald Trump, thanked him for including her at the Republican National convention.

title: The 'Collected Poems of Donald J. Trump' is for sale at the RNC
shortDescription: One fan believes Donald Trump's musing on X, formerly Twitter, is worthy of a poetry collection that is on sale at the Republican National Convention.

title: Ron DeSantis touts Trump, slams Biden in fiery speech at RNC
shortDescription: Ron DeSantis in a fiery speech at the RNC told his fellow Republicans that America cannot afford four more years of Joe Biden's presidency.

title: Trump rally shooting: What's real, what's not and how we know
shortDescription: There is overwhelming evidence to show the assassination attempt against Donald Trump really happened.

title: Cruz attacks Biden on immigration at RNC
shortDescription: Texas Sen. Ted Cruz attacks the immigration policy of President Joe Biden and the Democrats at the Republican National Convention.

title: Trump's takeover: In redefined GOP, populism and a new coalition reign
shortDescription: It's not the party of Reagan and the Bushes anymore. The Republican Party has been recast, and it looks and sounds like Donald Trump.
